creator: barbara.xxx1975@libero.it
text:
A new version of libkate has been released on 2010-08-10.
Previously - about 4 months ago - I filed a pr (155280) about two problems with the port but no one took care of that and the maintainer seems totally disappeared.
So I fixed the port as in the previous pr and updated it to the latest available version.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
